message:
fix(raptorq): use constraint matrix equations for source symbols in conformance tests

The top-level build_received_symbols() was using ReceivedSymbol::source()
which creates identity equations (column=esi, coeff=1).  Source symbols
need their proper LT encoding row equations from the constraint matrix
(rows S+H..S+H+K-1) for the decoder to reconstruct intermediate symbols
correctly.  This matches how the pipeline E2E tests and inner lib tests
already build their received symbol sets.

All 23 conformance tests now pass, including roundtrip, fuzz, edge cases,
and the full pipeline E2E.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
